name: PYI Corporation Limited
summary: PYI Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, develops and invests in ports and infrastructure in the Yangtze River region of the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company operates through Paul Y. Engineering Group, Ports Development, Ports and Logistics, Property, Securities, and Treasury segments. The Paul Y. Engineering Group segment is involved in building construction, civil engineering, development and project management, facilities and asset management, and property investment activities. The Ports Development segment develops ports facilities and ports related properties. The Ports and Logistics segment owns and operates ports and logistics facilities in the Yangtze River region of China; liquefied petroleum gas terminals and storage-tank farm; and automotive compressed natural gas fueling stations. The Property segment develops, invests, sells, and leases real estate properties and developed lands, and land and projects under development. The Securities segment invests and trades in securities. The Treasury segment provides credit and cash management services. PYI Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
